# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type Primitive = string | number | boolean;
type JsonValue = Primitive | null | JsonValue[] | { [key: string]: JsonValue };

interface UserRecord {
  userId: string;
  email?: string;
  status?: string;
  role?: string;
  country?: string;
  createdAt?: string;
  profile?: Record<string, JsonValue>;
  [key: string]: JsonValue | undefined;
}

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

const ALLOWED_FILTERS = new Set([
  "email",
  "status",
  "role",
  "country",
  "createdAt",
]);

function json(data: unknown, status = 200): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      "cache-control": "no-store",
    },
  });
}

function badRequest(message: string): Response {
  return json({ error: message }, 400);
}

function notFound(message = "Not found"): Response {
  return json({ error: message }, 404);
}

function methodNotAllowed(): Response {
  return json({ error: "Method not allowed" }, 405);
}

function sanitizeKeyPart(value: string): string {
  return value.trim();
}

function parseBody<T>(req: Request): Promise<T | null> {
  const contentType = req.headers.get("content-type") || "";
  if (!contentType.includes("application/json")) return Promise.resolve(null);
  return req.json();
}

function userPrimaryKey(userId: string) {
  return ["users", userId] as const;
}

function userIndexKey(userId: string, filterParam: string, filterValue: string) {
  return ["users", userId, filterParam, filterValue] as const;
}

function filterIndexKey(filterParam: string, filterValue: string, userId: string) {
  return ["users_by_filter", filterParam, filterValue, userId] as const;
}

async function putUser(user: UserRecord) {
  const userId = sanitizeKeyPart(user.userId);
  if (!userId) throw new Error("userId is required");

  const existing = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userPrimaryKey(userId));
  const oldUser = existing.value;

  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  atomic.set(userPrimaryKey(userId), { ...user, userId });

  for (const filterParam of ALLOWED_FILTERS) {
    const nextValue = user[filterParam];
    if (oldUser && oldUser[filterParam] !== undefined && oldUser[filterParam] !== nextValue) {
      const oldValue = String(oldUser[filterParam]);
      atomic.delete(userIndexKey(userId, filterParam, oldValue));
      atomic.delete(filterIndexKey(filterParam, oldValue, userId));
    }

    if (nextValue !== undefined && nextValue !== null) {
      const normalized = String(nextValue);
      atomic.set(userIndexKey(userId, filterParam, normalized), true);
      atomic.set(filterIndexKey(filterParam, normalized, userId), true);
    }
  }

  const res = await atomic.commit();
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to write user");
}

async function deleteUser(userId: string) {
  const id = sanitizeKeyPart(userId);
  const existing = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userPrimaryKey(id));
  if (!existing.value) return false;

  const user = existing.value;
  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  atomic.delete(userPrimaryKey(id));

  for (const filterParam of ALLOWED_FILTERS) {
    const value = user[filterParam];
    if (value !== undefined && value !== null) {
      const normalized = String(value);
      atomic.delete(userIndexKey(id, filterParam, normalized));
      atomic.delete(filterIndexKey(filterParam, normalized, id));
    }
  }

  const res = await atomic.commit();
  return res.ok;
}

async function getUser(userId: string): Promise<UserRecord | null> {
  const id = sanitizeKeyPart(userId);
  const result = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userPrimaryKey(id));
  return result.value ?? null;
}

async function searchUsers(params: URLSearchParams) {
  const userId = params.get("userId")?.trim();
  const filters = [...params.entries()].filter(
    ([key, value]) =>
      key !== "userId" &&
      key !== "limit" &&
      ALLOWED_FILTERS.has(key) &&
      value.trim().length > 0,
  );

  const limitRaw = params.get("limit");
  const limit = Math.max(1, Math.min(100, Number(limitRaw || "25") || 25));

  if (userId) {
    const exactKeys = filters.map(([filterParam, filterValue]) =>
      userIndexKey(sanitizeKeyPart(userId), sanitizeKeyPart(filterParam), sanitizeKeyPart(filterValue))
    );

    for (const key of exactKeys) {
      const hit = await kv.get<boolean>(key);
      if (!hit.value) {
        return [];
      }
    }

    const user = await getUser(userId);
    return user ? [user] : [];
  }

  if (filters.length === 0) {
    const results: UserRecord[] = [];
    for await (const entry of kv.list<UserRecord>({ prefix: ["users"] })) {
      if (entry.key.length === 2) {
        results.push(entry.value);
        if (results.length >= limit) break;
      }
    }
    return results;
  }

  const [firstFilterParam, firstFilterValue] = filters[0];
  const candidateIds: string[] = [];

  for await (const entry of kv.list<boolean>({
    prefix: ["users_by_filter", sanitizeKeyPart(firstFilterParam), sanitizeKeyPart(firstFilterValue)],
  })) {
    const key = entry.key;
    const id = String(key[key.length - 1]);
    candidateIds.push(id);
    if (candidateIds.length >= limit * 10) break;
  }

  const results: UserRecord[] = [];

  for (const candidateId of candidateIds) {
    let matched = true;

    for (let i = 1; i < filters.length; i++) {
      const [filterParam, filterValue] = filters[i];
      const hit = await kv.get<boolean>(
        userIndexKey(
          sanitizeKeyPart(candidateId),
          sanitizeKeyPart(filterParam),
          sanitizeKeyPart(filterValue),
        ),
      );
      if (!hit.value) {
        matched = false;
        break;
      }
    }

    if (!matched) continue;

    const user = await getUser(candidateId);
    if (user) {
      results.push(user);
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  }

  return results;
}

serve(async (req) => {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const pathname = url.pathname.replace(/\/+$/, "") || "/";

    if (pathname === "/health" && req.method === "GET") {
      return json({ ok: true });
    }

    if (pathname === "/users" && req.method === "POST") {
      const body = await parseBody<UserRecord>(req);
      if (!body || typeof body !== "object") {
        return badRequest("Invalid JSON body");
      }
      if (!body.userId || typeof body.userId !== "string") {
        return badRequest("userId is required");
      }

      await putUser(body);
      const saved = await getUser(body.userId);
      return json({ ok: true, user: saved }, 201);
    }

    if (pathname === "/users" && req.method === "GET") {
      const users = await searchUsers(url.searchParams);
      return json({ ok: true, count: users.length, users });
    }

    if (pathname.startsWith("/users/")) {
      const userId = decodeURIComponent(pathname.slice("/users/".length));

      if (req.method === "GET") {
        const user = await getUser(userId);
        return user ? json({ ok: true, user }) : notFound("User not found");
      }

      if (req.method === "DELETE") {
        const deleted = await deleteUser(userId);
        return deleted ? json({ ok: true }) : notFound("User not found");
      }

      if (req.method === "PUT") {
        const body = await parseBody<Partial<UserRecord>>(req);
        if (!body || typeof body !== "object") {
          return badRequest("Invalid JSON body");
        }

        const existing = await getUser(userId);
        if (!existing) return notFound("User not found");

        const merged: UserRecord = {
          ...existing,
          ...body,
          userId,
        };

        await putUser(merged);
        const saved = await getUser(userId);
        return json({ ok: true, user: saved });
      }

      return methodNotAllowed();
    }

    return notFound();
  } catch (error) {
    return json(
      {
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Internal server error",
      },
      500,
    );
  }
});
